items.title: Hungarians decide whether to end 16 years of Orbán rule and elect rival
items.summary: Most polls favour Péter Magyar, who fronts a grassroots party, but PM Viktor Orbán has been in a defiant mood.

items.title: 'It's a special thing to be on Planet Earth': Artemis crew welcomed home in Houston
items.summary: The four astronauts flew around the Moon in a nine-day voyage that took them further from Earth than any humans in history.

items.title: Why this disillusioned Trump voter spends hours searching Epstein files
items.summary: Many who support the president have expressed frustration with how Trump's former attorney general Pam Bondi handled the Epstein files.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美副總統范斯：沒有和伊朗達成任何協議
items.summary: 美國副總統范斯率領代表團，前往巴基斯坦與伊朗進行停戰協商，不過，范斯稍早召開記者會，透露美方沒有與伊朗達成任何協議。  據《CNN》報導，范斯在記者會上說了1個好消息和1個壞...…

items.title: 卡達宣布波斯灣全面恢復航行 但不代表荷姆茲海峽已開放
items.summary: 中東國家卡達宣布，當地時間12日將在波斯灣全面恢復（fully resume）航行，但這「不代表荷姆茲海峽已開放」，目前這處能源運輸要道還是鮮少有船隻通行。  據《CNN》報...…

items.title: 海外伊朗人：希望戰爭持續到推翻現有政權
items.summary: 美國、伊朗在巴基斯坦展開和談，不過，居住在加州洛杉磯的伊朗男子拉維（Rezi Ravi）透露，他留在伊國境內的家人們，都希望戰爭持續到推翻現有的伊斯蘭政權。  據《CNN》報...…
